changeSet.author: dts-copilot
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO copilot_ai.nl2sql_query_template (template_code, domain, role_hint, intent_patterns, question_samples, sql_template, parameters, target_view, description, priority) VALUES -- TPL-01: 项目在摆绿植数 ('TPL-01', 'project', NULL, '["(项目|XX).*(绿植|花).*(多少|几|数量|总数)"]', '["XX项目目前有多少在摆绿植？","XX项目的绿植数量","查一下XX项目有几盆花"]', 'SELECT project_name, count(*) as 在摆绿植数, sum(good_number) as 绿植总量 FROM v_project_green_current WHERE project_name LIKE CONCAT(''%'', :project_name, ''%'') GROUP BY project_name', '{"project_name":{"type":"string","required":true}}', 'v_project_green_current', '项目在摆绿植数', 10),
-- TPL-02: 在服项目总数 ('TPL-02', 'project', NULL, '["(在服|正常|当前|活跃).*(项目).*(多少|几|总数|数量)"]', '["当前在服项目一共多少个？","有多少正常运营的项目？","活跃项目数"]', 'SELECT project_status_name, count(*) as 项目数 FROM v_project_overview WHERE project_status_name = ''正常'' GROUP BY project_status_name', '{}', 'v_project_overview', '在服项目总数', 10),
-- TPL-03: 合同即将到期 ('TPL-03', 'project', NULL, '["(合同).*(到期|快到期|即将到期|过期)"]', '["哪些合同快到期了？","90天内到期的合同","即将到期的合同有哪些？"]', 'SELECT project_name, customer_name, contract_title, contract_end_date, DATEDIFF(contract_end_date, CURDATE()) as 剩余天数 FROM v_project_overview WHERE contract_status_name = ''执行中'' AND contract_end_date BETWEEN CURDATE() AND DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL :days DAY) ORDER BY contract_end_date ASC', '{"days":{"type":"integer","default":90}}', 'v_project_overview', '合同即将到期', 10),
-- TPL-04: 客户项目查询 ('TPL-04', 'project', NULL, '["(客户|XX).*(有|下面|名下).*(几个|多少|哪些).*(项目)"]', '["XX客户下面有几个项目？","XX客户名下的项目有哪些？"]', 'SELECT customer_name, project_name, project_status_name, green_count, total_rent FROM v_project_overview WHERE customer_name LIKE CONCAT(''%'', :customer_name, ''%'') ORDER BY project_name', '{"customer_name":{"type":"string","required":true}}', 'v_project_overview', '客户项目查询', 10),
-- TPL-05: 项目报花次数统计 ('TPL-05', 'flowerbiz', NULL, '["(项目|XX).*(换花|加花|减花|报花).*(多少|几|次数|次)"]', '["XX项目这个月换花了多少次？","本月XX项目的加花次数"]', 'SELECT project_name, biz_type_name, count(*) as 次数, sum(plant_number) as 总数量 FROM v_flower_biz_detail WHERE project_name LIKE CONCAT(''%'', :project_name, ''%'') AND biz_month = :month GROUP BY project_name, biz_type_name ORDER BY 次数 DESC', '{"project_name":{"type":"string","required":true},"month":{"type":"string","default":"CURRENT_MONTH"}}', 'v_flower_biz_detail', '项目报花次数统计', 10),
-- TPL-06: 各项目加花排行 ('TPL-06', 'flowerbiz', NULL, '["(项目|各项目).*(加花|换花|报花).*(排行|排名|最多)"]', '["各项目加花次数排行","本月哪个项目加花最多？","报花排行榜"]', 'SELECT project_name, count(*) as 次数, sum(plant_number) as 总数量 FROM v_flower_biz_detail WHERE biz_type_name = :biz_type AND biz_month = :month GROUP BY project_name ORDER BY 次数 DESC LIMIT :top_n', '{"biz_type":{"type":"string","default":"加花"},"month":{"type":"string","default":"CURRENT_MONTH"},"top_n":{"type":"integer","default":10}}', 'v_flower_biz_detail', '各项目加花排行', 10),
-- TPL-07: 报花业务类型分布 ('TPL-07', 'flowerbiz', NULL, '["(本月|这个月|上月).*(报花|业务).*(加花|换花|减花).*(各|分别|分布|各多少)"]', '["本月报花业务中，加花/换花/减花各多少？","这个月各类型报花数量"]', 'SELECT biz_type_name, count(*) as 业务单数, sum(plant_number) as 总数量 FROM v_flower_biz_detail WHERE biz_month = :month AND biz_status_name NOT IN (''作废'', ''驳回'', ''草稿'') GROUP BY biz_type_name ORDER BY 业务单数 DESC', '{"month":{"type":"string","default":"CURRENT_MONTH"}}', 'v_flower_biz_detail', '报花业务类型分布', 10),
-- TPL-08: 待审批报花单 ('TPL-08', 'flowerbiz', NULL, '["(待审批|审核中|未审批).*(报花|业务单)"]', '["有多少待审批的报花单？","审核中的业务单有哪些？"]', 'SELECT biz_code, biz_type_name, project_name, apply_user_name, apply_time FROM v_flower_biz_detail WHERE biz_status_name = ''审核中'' ORDER BY apply_time DESC', '{}', 'v_flower_biz_detail', '待审批报花单', 10),
-- TPL-09: 项目月租金查询 ('TPL-09', 'settlement', 'finance', '["(项目|XX).*(上月|上个月|本月|这个月).*(租金|应收|收入)"]', '["XX项目上个月租金是多少？","本月各项目租金"]', 'SELECT project_name, customer_name, settlement_month, total_rent as 应收租金, received_amount as 已收, outstanding_amount as 未收 FROM v_monthly_settlement WHERE (:project_name IS NULL OR project_name LIKE CONCAT(''%'', :project_name, ''%'')) AND settlement_month = :month', '{"project_name":{"type":"string"},"month":{"type":"string","default":"LAST_MONTH"}}', 'v_monthly_settlement', '项目月租金查询', 10),
-- TPL-10: 未结算项目 ('TPL-10', 'settlement', 'finance', '["(未结算|待结算|没结算).*(项目)"]', '["上月未结算的项目有哪些？","还有哪些项目没结算？"]', 'SELECT project_name, customer_name, settlement_month, total_rent, settlement_status_name FROM v_monthly_settlement WHERE settlement_status_name = ''待结算'' AND settlement_month = :month ORDER BY total_rent DESC', '{"month":{"type":"string","default":"LAST_MONTH"}}', 'v_monthly_settlement', '未结算项目', 10),
-- TPL-11: 客户欠款查询 ('TPL-11', 'settlement', 'finance', '["(客户|XX).*(欠款|未收|应收未收|欠|拖欠)"]', '["XX客户累计欠款多少？","哪些客户还有欠款？"]', 'SELECT customer_name, sum(outstanding_amount) as 累计欠款, count(DISTINCT project_name) as 涉及项目数 FROM v_monthly_settlement WHERE outstanding_amount > 0 AND (:customer_name IS NULL OR customer_name LIKE CONCAT(''%'', :customer_name, ''%'')) GROUP BY customer_name ORDER BY 累计欠款 DESC', '{"customer_name":{"type":"string"}}', 'v_monthly_settlement', '客户欠款查询', 10),
-- TPL-12: 项目租金排名 ('TPL-12', 'settlement', 'finance', '["(项目).*(租金|收入).*(排名|排行)"]', '["上季度各项目租金收入排名","项目租金排行"]', 'SELECT project_name, customer_name, sum(total_rent) as 累计租金 FROM v_monthly_settlement WHERE settlement_month BETWEEN :start_month AND :end_month GROUP BY project_name, customer_name ORDER BY 累计租金 DESC LIMIT :top_n', '{"start_month":{"type":"string","required":true},"end_month":{"type":"string","required":true},"top_n":{"type":"integer","default":10}}', 'v_monthly_settlement', '项目租金排名', 10),
-- TPL-13: 待处理任务 ('TPL-13', 'task', NULL, '["(待处理|待办|进行中|未完成).*(任务)"]', '["今天有多少待处理的任务？","进行中的任务有哪些？"]', 'SELECT task_code, task_title, task_type_name, project_name, leading_user_name, launch_time, completion_rate FROM v_task_progress WHERE task_status_name = ''进行中'' ORDER BY launch_time DESC', '{}', 'v_task_progress', '待处理任务', 10),
-- TPL-14: 初摆任务进度 ('TPL-14', 'pendulum', NULL, '["(初摆).*(任务|进度|进行中|待完成)"]', '["进行中的初摆任务有几个？","初摆进度怎么样？"]', 'SELECT pendulum_code, pendulum_title, pendulum_status_name, project_name, applicant_name, applicant_date, total_budget_cost, actual_cost FROM v_pendulum_progress WHERE pendulum_status_name IN (''初摆中'', ''待审批'') ORDER BY applicant_date DESC', '{}', 'v_pendulum_progress', '初摆任务进度', 10),
-- TPL-15: 养护人负责摆位 ('TPL-15', 'curing', NULL, '["(养护人|XX).*(负责|管理).*(摆位|多少)"]', '["XX养护人负责哪些摆位？","养护人均负责多少摆位？"]', 'SELECT curing_user_name, sum(total_position_count) as 负责摆位总数 FROM v_curing_coverage WHERE curing_month = :month AND (:curing_user IS NULL OR curing_user_name LIKE CONCAT(''%'', :curing_user, ''%'')) GROUP BY curing_user_name ORDER BY 负责摆位总数 DESC', '{"month":{"type":"string","default":"CURRENT_MONTH"},"curing_user":{"type":"string"}}', 'v_curing_coverage', '养护人负责摆位', 10),
-- TPL-16: 未养护摆位 ('TPL-16', 'curing', NULL, '["(没养护|未养护|还没养护).*(摆位)"]', '["本月哪些摆位还没做过养护？","未养护的摆位有多少？"]', 'SELECT project_name, curing_user_name, total_position_count, covered_position_count, (total_position_count - covered_position_count) as 未养护摆位数, coverage_rate FROM v_curing_coverage WHERE curing_month = :month AND coverage_rate < 1.0 ORDER BY 未养护摆位数 DESC', '{"month":{"type":"string","default":"CURRENT_MONTH"}}', 'v_curing_coverage', '未养护摆位', 10),
-- TPL-17: 项目换花率排行 ('TPL-17', 'flowerbiz', NULL, '["(换花率|换花.*(比例|率)|换花最多)"]', '["哪个项目换花率最高？","各项目换花比例排行"]', 'SELECT po.project_name, IFNULL(fb.换花次数, 0) as 换花次数, po.green_count as 在摆绿植数, CASE WHEN po.green_count > 0 THEN ROUND(IFNULL(fb.换花次数, 0) / po.green_count, 2) ELSE 0 END as 换花率 FROM v_project_overview po LEFT JOIN (SELECT project_name, count(*) as 换花次数 FROM v_flower_biz_detail WHERE biz_type_name = ''换花'' AND biz_month = :month GROUP BY project_name) fb ON po.project_name = fb.project_name WHERE po.project_status_name = ''正常'' ORDER BY 换花率 DESC LIMIT :top_n', '{"month":{"type":"string","default":"CURRENT_MONTH"},"top_n":{"type":"integer","default":10}}', 'v_project_overview', '项目换花率排行', 10),
-- TPL-18: 绿植数量变化最大的项目 ('TPL-18', 'flowerbiz', NULL, '["(绿植).*(变化|变动|增减).*(最大|最多)"]', '["哪些项目的绿植数量变化最大？","本月绿植增减变动排行"]', 'SELECT project_name, sum(CASE WHEN biz_type_name = ''加花'' THEN plant_number ELSE 0 END) as 加花数, sum(CASE WHEN biz_type_name = ''减花'' THEN plant_number ELSE 0 END) as 减花数, (sum(CASE WHEN biz_type_name = ''加花'' THEN plant_number ELSE 0 END) - sum(CASE WHEN biz_type_name = ''减花'' THEN plant_number ELSE 0 END)) as 净变化 FROM v_flower_biz_detail WHERE biz_month = :month AND biz_type_name IN (''加花'', ''减花'') AND biz_status_name NOT IN (''作废'', ''驳回'', ''草稿'') GROUP BY project_name ORDER BY abs(净变化) DESC LIMIT :top_n', '{"month":{"type":"string","default":"CURRENT_MONTH"},"top_n":{"type":"integer","default":10}}', 'v_flower_biz_detail', '绿植数量变化最大的项目', 10),
-- TPL-19: 减花回收情况 ('TPL-19', 'flowerbiz', NULL, '["(减花|回收).*(情况|统计|数量)"]', '["XX项目的减花回收情况怎么样？","本月减花统计"]', 'SELECT project_name, count(*) as 减花单数, sum(plant_number) as 减花总量, sum(biz_total_cost) as 涉及成本 FROM v_flower_biz_detail WHERE biz_type_name = ''减花'' AND biz_month = :month AND (:project_name IS NULL OR project_name LIKE CONCAT(''%'', :project_name, ''%'')) GROUP BY project_name ORDER BY 减花总量 DESC', '{"month":{"type":"string","default":"CURRENT_MONTH"},"project_name":{"type":"string"}}', 'v_flower_biz_detail', '减花回收情况', 10),
-- TPL-20: 结算方式分布 ('TPL-20', 'project', NULL, '["(结算方式|固定月租).*(哪些|分布|项目)"]', '["哪些项目的结算方式是固定月租？","各结算方式的项目分布"]', 'SELECT settlement_type_name, count(*) as 项目数, sum(total_rent) as 月租金合计 FROM v_project_overview WHERE project_status_name = ''正常'' GROUP BY settlement_type_name', '{}', 'v_project_overview', '结算方式分布', 10);
